security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' blob:; worker-src blob: 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://api.anthropic.com https://api.openai.com https://openrouter.ai http://localhost:11434; img-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: A fast SQLite IDE with AI-powered SQL generation.
bundle.longDescription: QuaryLite is an open-source desktop SQLite IDE. Browse tables, run queries in a Monaco editor, explore schema relationships, manage transactions, and ask an AI assistant to write SQL — using Anthropic, OpenAI, OpenRouter, or a local Ollama model.
